summary: Iteration 23 - P0 Features Testing Complete. All requested features validated: 1) Mood check-in API with dynamic verses and daily rotation, 2) Verse translation across IT/EN/ES languages, 3) Daily verse API with rotation and translation, 4) Biblical dictionary with 106+ terms, 5) Share button fallback code reviewed and correctly implemented.
seed_data_creation: None needed - existing test user used
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features verified: mood-checkin with daily rotation and multilingual support (IT/EN/ES), daily-verse with rotation, dictionary with 106 terms (Ebraico, Greco, Aramaico, Latino origins), and shareVerse function with web clipboard fallback. Backend tests in test_p0_features.py with 15 passing tests. Frontend mood selection triggers API call correctly with AI-generated reflection.

mood_checkin_api.notes: Returns verse + AI reflection, daily rotation verified, multilingual support working

daily_verse_api.notes: Daily rotation consistent, proper translation with localized book names

dictionary_api.notes: 106 terms returned (alphabetically sorted), origins include Ebraico/Greco/Aramaico/Latino, search works

share_button_fallback.implementation: Uses navigator.clipboard.writeText for web with fallback to react-native Clipboard, shows 'Copiato negli appunti!' alert on success
share_button_fallback.notes: Correctly implemented with try-catch and fallback chain
